name: Corrupted Beacon

pages.text: Will give entities in its beam $(thing)Wither$() effect. Some mobs will transform to another mob. Put the activated Corrupted Beacon under the cauldron, and then you can use it together with the anvil for time-warp processing. $(p)$(#888888)Release the Wither's power that been sealed in the normal beacon.$()

When you fully using $(l:smithing/tier_1_materials#cursed_gold_block)Cursed Gold Block$() as the base of beacons and use $(l:smithing/tier_1_materials#cursed_gold_ingot)Cursed Gold Ingot$() to activate it, the beacon will have chance to convert into $(item)Corrupted Beacon$(). The more layers of the base, the higher the conversion probability.$(br)($(thing)Automation Method$(): Use an anvil to press the curse gold ingot into the beacon. The probabilities are the same.) $(p)Use Cursed Gold Ingot to activate beacons will make weather set to Thunder.

pages.name: Time Warp
pages.text: Time Warp operation requires lit Corrupted Beacon. This means if you want to use magnet block to control anvils on top, you need to use $(item)Hollow Magnet Block$().
Metals can be transformed into coarse ores
